name: OCaml (alindesign)
description: Ubuntu base + alindesign dotfiles (zsh, starship, CLI tools) + OCaml via opam, with dune + ocaml-lsp-server + ocamlformat.

ocamlVersion.description: OCaml compiler version for the default opam switch.

gitUserName.description: git user.name (optional; can also be set after the fact).

gitUserEmail.description: git user.email (optional; can also be set after the fact).
